text: Congratulations! Becoming a parent is one of the most profound and life-changing things a person can experience, and I'm so happy for you. The love you'll feel for your child is unlike anything else in the world, and watching them grow, learn, and discover everything for the first time is nothing short of magical. There will be sleepless nights and moments of doubt, sure, but there will also be laughter, wonder, and a kind of joy you never knew was possible. You're going to be wonderful at this. Welcome to the most incredible adventure of your life.
